Module.Content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<style>
  html, body {
    margin:0;
    padding:0;
    width:100%;
    height:100%;
    overflow:hidden;
    background:#000;
  }
  iframe {
    width:100vw;
    height:100vh;
    border:0;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<iframe src="https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbxRR9j9VoEVe3ftwVkqAslFNtnJ1UUWj8hLc51en9qR8fsVz2gho9geBFjasY0IV8gJBQ/exec" allowfullscreen></iframe>
</body>
</html>
